# MonsieurData

> MonsieurData is the digital analytics practice of Dimitri Dries, a
> remote-first digital analytics developer. He builds measurement setups that
> teams can trust: Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Tag Manager (GTM)
> implementations, server-side tagging, Consent Mode v2, BigQuery data
> pipelines and reporting dashboards.

## What is a digital analytics developer?

A digital analytics developer is the hands-on, technical counterpart to an
analytics consultant: someone who implements tracking plans, dataLayers,
GA4/GTM containers, server-side tagging and the data pipelines behind them,
rather than only advising on strategy.

## Services

- **Analytics Audit**: structured review of GA4/GTM tracking, data quality,
  consent and reporting, ending in a prioritised roadmap. (~2 weeks)
- **Implementation Sprint**: hands-on delivery of tracking plans, GA4/GTM
  (web and server-side), BigQuery pipelines and dashboards. (4-8 weeks)
- **Data Partner** (highest value): ongoing retainer where Dimitri works
  embedded in the client's team and tools for a fixed number of days per
  month, covering monitoring, analysis and new tracking needs.

## Expertise

Google Analytics 4, Google Tag Manager, server-side tagging, tracking plans
and dataLayer design, Consent Mode v2 and CMP integration, GDPR-compliant
measurement, BigQuery, SQL, dbt, Python, Looker Studio, Power BI, AppsFlyer,
marketing data models.

## Working model

Remote-first, working with marketing and product teams across Europe, the UK
and the US. Pricing is on demand: every engagement gets a fixed, itemised
proposal after a free intro call.
